name: android-mobile-config
description: Configure Android product flavors, Firebase, app assets, and optional network security from agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Configure Android flavors, Firebase, and app assets
interface.longDescription: Deterministic Android setup workflows for product flavors, Firebase google-services.json files, flavor-specific app names, generated assets, and optional network security.
defaultPrompt: Use Android Mobile Config to configure dev and prod Android flavors.
Use Android Mobile Config to configure Firebase for Android flavors.
Use Android Mobile Config to generate Android app assets.
Use Android Mobile Config to configure dev-only network security.
